title: taraxacum velebiticum
intro: Taraxacum velebiticum, also known as the Dinaric dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Dinaric Alps region of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum velebiticum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to aid in reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum velebiticum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
